query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS service_invoices (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  invoice_number VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  service_type ENUM('design', 'media') NOT NULL,
  package_id INT,
  custom_service_name VARCHAR(255),
  client_type ENUM('internal_house', 'internal_business', 'external') NOT NULL,
  client_id INT,
  client_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  client_email VARCHAR(255),
  is_laws_member BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  subtotal DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  discount_amount DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  discount_reason VARCHAR(255),
  tax_amount DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  total_amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('draft', 'sent', 'paid', 'partial', 'overdue', 'cancelled', 'refunded') DEFAULT 'draft',
  due_date BIGINT,
  paid_at BIGINT,
  stripe_payment_intent_id VARCHAR(255),
  stripe_invoice_id VARCHAR(255),
  notes TEXT,
  line_items JSON,
  created_by_id INT NOT NULL,
  created_by_name VARCHAR(255),
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (package_id) REFERENCES service_packages(id)
);

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS service_invoices (

  invoice_number VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  service_type ENUM('design', 'media') NOT NULL,
  package_id INT,
  custom_service_name VARCHAR(255),
  client_type ENUM('internal_house', 'internal_business', 'external') NOT NULL,
  client_id INT,
  client_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  client_email VARCHAR(255),
  is_laws_member BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  subtotal DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  discount_amount DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  discount_reason VARCHAR(255),
  tax_amount DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  total_amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('draft', 'sent', 'paid', 'partial', 'overdue', 'cancelled', 'refunded') DEFAULT 'draft',
  due_date BIGINT,
  paid_at BIGINT,
  stripe_payment_intent_id VARCHAR(255),
  stripe_invoice_id VARCHAR(255),
  notes TEXT,
  line_items JSON,
  created_by_id INT NOT NULL,
  created_by_name VARCHAR(255),
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (package_id) REFERENCES service_packages(id)
);
